title: 2nd-year win for Mossel Bay Roofing
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The team at Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The team at Mossel Bay Roofing are humbled and grateful to be nominated and ultimately awarded the Best of Mossel Bay Award for the second time.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The team at Mossel Bay Roofing are humbled and grateful to be nominated and ultimately awarded the Best of Mossel Bay Award for the second time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The past 25 years of dedication to the building trade has again culminated in this prestigious award.","html":"The past 25 years of dedication to the building trade has again culminated in this prestigious award."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The recent relocation to our newly built factory in Voorbaai Crescent has allowed us to increase our roof truss production, thereby allowing us to expand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We now have an extended product range, which adds value to our existing roof material supply.","html":"We now have an extended product range, which adds value to our existing roof material supply."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The success of our company lies with the dedicated, experienced and professional staff, who apply leadership and take ownership to ensure the best service to our customers. We pride ourselves on a peaceful, team-orientated environment.","html":"The success of our company lies with the dedicated, experienced and professional staff, who apply leadership and take ownership to ensure the best service to our customers. We pride ourselves on a peaceful, team-orientated environment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On behalf of our entire team, we want to extend our heartfelt thanks to all our customers for your loyal and continued support.","html":"On behalf of our entire team, we want to extend our heartfelt thanks to all our customers for your loyal and continued support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We truly appreciate the trust you have placed in us and the opportunity to serve you. Your loyalty and encouragement inspire us to keep improving and delivering the best possible service.","html":"We truly appreciate the trust you have placed in us and the opportunity to serve you. Your loyalty and encouragement inspire us to keep improving and delivering the best possible service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We wouldn’t be where we are today without our customers, and we are sincerely grateful for your part in our journey.","html":"We wouldn’t be where we are today without our customers, and we are sincerely grateful for your part in our journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We give all the glory to God for leading us every step of the way.","html":"We give all the glory to God for leading us every step of the way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Roofing team ready to serve!","html":"Mossel Bay Roofing team ready to serve!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
